programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr Sloan suspects a TV hostess of murdering a controversial radio presenter - but she seems to have the perfect alibi. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke, Morton Downey Jr and Vicki Lawrence

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A loan shark, a stockbroker and a group of women pose problems for Dr Sloan as he tries to track down the person responsible for a friend's murder. Dick Van Dyke stars

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Part one of two. Forced to flee from Nevada to avoid immediate capture, Kimble's only chance to escape a roadblock is by helping a nun

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A woman confesses to murder while under the influence of a truth serum, but Perry suspects that she is innocent and sets out to find the real culprit

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An embittered woman jeopardises her life by exposing her abusive husband's drug operation. Drama, starring Chuck Norris

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: E-mails and text messages trigger a mass gathering of people on a golf course to perform a random task, but the body of a student is found when they disperse. Horatio and the team link a schoolmaster's daughter to the murder and evidence reveals the victim was having an affair with his chemistry teacher. David Caruso, Emily Procter and Adam Rodriguez star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The body of a Navy lieutenant is discovered during a city-wide power cut - and because Jethro and the team are unable to use their modern electronic equipment, they have to solve the case the old-fashioned way, and it soon becomes apparent that national security could be at stake. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Marine Daniel Zuna is found dead in a pool of his own blood in an alleyway outside a night club, and the team's first stop is to investigate the mixed martial arts gym where the victim spent most of his off-duty time. Kensi poses as Zuna's new girlfriend and suspects the murder could be related to something that happened in Iraq, prompting Sam to go undercover as an MMA fighter in order to see if he can find out the truth. Crime drama, starring LL Cool J and Daniela Ruah

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Working in a Turkish bath, Kimble is recognised by a local sheriff, but a fellow worker helps him escape

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: After a house trailer is stolen, the owner calls on Perry for help as it allegedly contained a diary with the true account of a bank heist years earlier

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to the home of a bomb disposal expert who shot and killed an intruder during a robbery. The case appears to be straightforward until Tony discovers she lied about being alone during the incident, and the evidence suggests a link to a case in which a man walked free after paralysing a member of the public in a shootout. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A scientist who has discovered a possible cure for genetic diseases is kidnapped leading Walker to attempt to rescue him. Adventure, starring Chuck Norris

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: New Mossad director Orli Elbaz asks for the team's help in finding Ilan Bodnar when one of her agents is shot dead in Virginia, telling Gibbs he was investigating several operatives who had gone rogue after Eli David's death. Ziva travels with Tony to Berlin in her pursuit of Bodnar, the man she believes was responsible for the death of her father. Guest starring Marina Sirtis (Star Trek: The Next Generation)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A couple are taking in the view from a cliff top when a car driven by an already bleeding man crashes into theirs and teeters on the brink before plunging over the precipice. Callen and the team are brought in to investigate when the driver is identified as Lieutenant Brian Roth, and they discover that the car is registered to a Hollywood socialite Aubrey Darva. Crime drama, starring Chris O'Donnell

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team becomes involved in an international incident when the body of an American petty officer is found by an estate agent in a bungalow that has been repossessed. An indentation on the victim's skull leads the agents to believe he was killed on a British ship, but collecting evidence from the vessel proves challenging. Guest starring Tracy Middendorf, Daniel Gillies and Kristen Ariza

programme.desc: Jesse and Dr Sloan are infected with a virus and face imminent death unless Steve and Amanda can find a cure. Crime drama, starring Dick and Barry Van Dyke, with Victoria Rowell, Charlie Schlatter and Michael Tucci

programme.desc: The team tracks Bodnar's SUV to a remote house in the countryside, but inside find only his dead accomplice - identified as a South African mercenary who helped Bodnar procure diamonds. Ziva and Tony, meanwhile, discharge themselves from hospital and wheedle information out of Abby to continue investigating on the quiet, having been warned by Homeland Security to stay off the case

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Eric pulls the team together when he finds a video of kidnapped agent Dominic Vail posted on a jihadist website, with the terrorists holding him stating that he will be executed within 24 hours unless a comrade of theirs being held by the US government is released. One of the captors is identified as a being an associate of Sam, and his involvement also seems to indicate Dom is being held in Sudan. Crime drama, starring LL Cool J

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the deaths of a radio DJ and a naval officer who were both killed during a live broadcast, only to discover there are a number of potential suspects. Evidence leads the agents to suspect the involvement of a radical group called Military at Home, prompting Tony to investigate an upmarket gated community - where his door-to-door inquiries yield an enticing proposition or two from the female residents. American drama, starring Michael Weatherly, with Nadia Bjorlin

Starring Patricia Arquette

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Newly retired detective Harry Trumble returns to the force, convinced his old adversary the Clown Killer has re-emerged from obscurity to claim fresh victims - but Mark is reluctant to help in his investigation. Jack Klugman guest stars

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: A woman from Cabe's past asks for help in apprehending a Serbian war criminal, so the team travels to Cuba to track him down. Walter faces a judge following his car accident

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo teams up with his girlfriend, ATF agent Zoe Keates, to investigate the circumstances surrounding the death of a US Marine in what initially seems like a simple road accident. The team reveals the dead man did indeed die due to a broken neck sustained during a crash, but someone shot at him first. As DiNozzo and Keates pursue their inquiry, they discover the victim's death is connected to a controversial ATF plan to place traceable firearms in the criminal system, and then follow them to the heads of crime organisations. Naval crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US marine visits the home of his former captain, only to find the man has been killed, and the killer is waiting inside the property. While the soldier escapes with his life, the attacker gets away too. It quickly emerges the prime suspect is Qasim, an Afghan translator evidence, and evidence points against him, until it is discovered he has a brother, who is loyal to the Taliban. The subsequent chain of evidence leads Gibbs and Bishop to Afghanistan

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Naval intelligence ensign is killed in an unusual car accident. Gibbs and his team are reunited with old friend Ned Dorneget, who is now working with NCIS cyber operations, and NSA attorney Jake Malloy to investigate the case, and discover a conspiracy involving terrorist recruitment on the internet

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Special Agent Ned Dorneget of the NCIS cyber division joins the team to further their investigation into The Calling, the insidious terror network radicalising youngsters via the internet. When it emerges young suicide bomber Bradley was not, in fact, affiliated with The Calling, Gibbs and his colleagues realise they might be back to square-one. Determined to bring the organisation down, the agents pursue two new leads, an arms dealer who may be supplying The Calling with their signature German S-mines, and another boy given a deadly mission by the terrorists. Guest starring Matt Jones

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The death of Special Agent Ned Dorneget hits the team hard, and when Gibbs receives a visit from his late colleague's mother - CIA Officer Joanna Teague - he must decide whether to let her help with the investigation into the Calling. Meanwhile, Gibbs hopes his young charge Luke, formerly one of the Calling's radicalised footsoldiers, might be key to bringing the organisation down. However, when the terrorists discover where their defecting comrade has taken refuge, the abduct him and flee to Iraq. The team follows hot on their heels, but it seems Luke's ties to the Calling might be stronger than anyone at NCIS ever anticipated. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, with guest Mimi Rogers

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: US Marine sergeant Teddy Lemere is killed by a sniper in Afghanistan just after his sniffer dog helps guide a young child out of a minefield. Back in the US, his widow Ruby tells Gibbs and the team that she had recently received a message from her husband saying he might have upset a few people. Abby retrieves a tiny shard of the sniper's bullet from Ted's helmet and finds that it was made in America

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A doctor dies on board the USS Borealis during a heavy storm and when the ship is brought into Norfolk Naval Yard, Ducky's investigation reveals a telltale mark on the victim's carotid artery, suggesting he was injected with poison. Initial inquiries focus on a petty officer with a history of drug use who may have wanted the doctor to remain silent about his problems. American drama, starring David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team are called in when a Navy reservist returns home to find her husband missing and her living room covered in blood, and make a grim discovery when they find a finger in the bin. programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Baby Alfie is rushed to hospital after suffering a fit, leaving Ruth and Simon beside themselves with worry and guilt. Vic's proposal for a merger between the two rival rugby teams meets with opposition, while Tom Lewis has one of those days _ first he's made redundant, and then he gets into a fight with a man he suspects is having an affair with his wife. Drama, starring Sarah Lancashire

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Max, Grace and Jacob arrest a drug dealer as he makes a deal but his runner escapes, his face concealed by a hoodie. The investigation takes a serious turn when the youngster crashes the stolen car he is driving and runs off, leaving a passenger fighting for her life. The unidentified fugitive is eventually traced to a bail hostel, where three possible suspects are taken in for questioning, but a false confession makes the detectives' job doubly difficult

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Sacha tries to encourage Ella, a medical student on the verge of quitting - but a confrontation on AAU makes him realise he may have overestimated her capabilities. programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Holby ED comes under investigation for its handling of the bombing, with Tess, Charlie and Nathan's roles scrutinised. Matters worsen after the hospital receives unflattering headlines, and rumours circulate when it becomes clear the papers have got their information from an inside source. Guppy tries to bring Harry back from Westminster, while the team struggles to find a bed for an elderly patient

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: The resident magician of a social club turns to crime to fund a gambling habit and falls prey to a blackmailer threatening to harm his girlfriend. Neil and Stevie persuade the hapless entertainer to take part in a sting operation at the club but the suspect under surveillance becomes involved in a brawl and the money vanishes into thin air

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Cindy's return to the Square leaves Ian reeling. Bianca is sulking about Jacques. Nigel visits Julie with a raunchy French video. Peggy organises a party

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Bianca interrupts Robbie's flirtation attempts with Mary. Grant tells Phil that he and Tiffany are doing a runner and going to a posh restaurant in town

programme.title: A Place to Call Home
programme.desc: Sarah is concerned about the risks involved in Rene's brain operation and refuses to give her consent, while George steps down as the Country Party candidate and attempts to face his demons regarding his strained relationship with his father. Elizabeth comes home from Sydney to attend Georgie's christening and Gino is worried about his vine saplings

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: A summer-show entertainer becomes the victim of a malicious practical joke - and Jim soon has difficulty telling truth from lies. Guest starring Rikki Fulton and Joanne Whalley

programme.title: Dangerfield
programme.desc: A lung cancer patient dies suddenly, and Dangerfield discovers signs on the body suggesting euthanasia. Matters are complicated by the fact that the doctor he suspects is not only a colleague but also an old friend. Guest starring Nigel Havers

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: While reseaching her book on prisons, Dorien meets an incarcerated Chris on a visit to the Isle of Wight, and is promptly taken in by his criticisms of Sharon as a bad wife. Comedy, starring Lesley Joseph, Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Joe Maplin commissions a statue of himself and issues strict instructions for the unveiling - paving the way for more chaos and confusion at the holiday camp. Comedy, starring Simon Cadell and Paul Shane

programme.title: To the Manor Born
programme.desc: An old school friend of Audrey's wishes to visit, but is unaware of her former classmate's unfortunate circumstances, so the former lady of the manor arranges for DeVere to entertain her. Classic comedy, starring Penelope Keith and Peter Bowles

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: As Barry tires of golf and looks for a new hobby, Billy's latest idea of an archery course is right on target. Long-running comedy series, starring Mike Grady, Keith Clifford and Peter Sallis

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: The death of a retired detective on his favourite golf course looks like a copycat murder. Dalziel points the finger of suspicion at local villain Danny Macer - but his relentless pursuit of his old adversary only serves to get him thrown off the case. Feature-length episode, directed by and starring Warren Clarke, with guest appearances from John Duttine, Pippa Guard and Diana Quick

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The ex-coppers find themselves under the microscope when a psychologist arrives to conduct a study into older men in the workplace - but she soon reveals a more personal reason for her visit. It turns out that five years ago her brother, a cycle courier, was the victim of a hit-and-run that left him unable to recall anything prior to the incident. Now he says he was targeted for the parcel he was carrying, which was stolen at the scene - or so he believes. Sally Phillips guest stars

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: A baby is found on the doorstep of businessman Jack Bellamy, who is lying dead inside. The detectives discover the victim was a serial adulterer with a string of women who could have grounds for murder, but as the rest of the team concentrates on following the leads, Robbie finds himself growing attached to the abandoned child. Drama, starring John Michie, Blythe Duff and Hugo Speer

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The team finds evidence linking a soon-to-be-released benefits fraudster with a string of murders. Unfortunately, the nature of their proof is circumstantial at best - and with only a short while to go until the end of the man's nine-month sentence, the detectives have their work cut out to solve the crimes before he is released and free to kill again. Detective drama, starring Trevor Eve and Sue Johnston

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon and Tracey find their glamorous new jobs in a casino have a hidden downside, while Dorien rekindles an old flame

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Simmering tensions in the Goddard household come to a head as Ruth gives Simon his marching orders, enraged to discover he's remortgaged the house without consulting her. Meanwhile, Stephen reacts badly to the news that fellow teacher Martin Williams has attempted suicide - and responds by seeking solace in Jacqui's arms. Sarah Lancashire, Jason Done, Pam Ferris and Tony Haygarth star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: The resident magician of a social club turns to crime to fund a gambling habit and falls prey to a blackmailer threatening to harm his girlfriend. Paul Nicholls, Chizzy Akudolu and Michael Thomson join the cast

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Guppy saves the life of a boy whose arm is trapped, but the praise he receives is not enough to convince him to stay at the ED. Meanwhile, Toby experiences a death in his care and Nathan is left reeling by Harry's return to Holby as his new boss. Medical drama, starring Simon MacCorkindale and Elyes Gabel

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. Beth shocks Tony by revealing she has applied for a transfer, but before they can discuss it further they spot a woman preparing to jump to her death from a bridge over the River Thames. Nate eventually rescues her from the water, only to find she is carrying a bag of heroin. Investigations into the source of the drugs focus on the boxing club where she works

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Claire tries to regain a lost friendship. Phil and Annie explore dangerous new territory. Ian is given a chance to take his revenge

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Ricky secretly buys a cot for the newly finished nursery. When Bianca has her scan the baby is found to have spina bifida. Annie has an interesting offer for Ian about a restaurant

programme.title: A Place to Call Home
programme.desc: James's continued absence leaves Olivia distraught on the morning of Georgie's christening. An anxious Sarah is comforted by Dr Fox

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Charlie enters the political arena, but a murder soon stops his campaign dead in its tracks. Jersey-based detective drama, with John Nettles and Terence Alexander

programme.title: Dangerfield
programme.desc: Paul is reluctantly drawn into a complicated crash investigation, becoming the target of a disturbed woman who turns up at the surgery baying for blood. Meanwhile, Al prepares for her wedding day - but it seems the dashing doctor may not make it to the church on time. Drama, starring Nigel Le Vaillant, Tamzin Malleson and Tim Vincent

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey tries to help ex-con Desmond, but Sharon is convinced he is a lost cause - and she is soon proved right. Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke star

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Peggy's penfriend comes to stay, but some of the staff are not convinced his intentions are entirely honourable. Comedy, starring Su Pollard

programme.title: To the Manor Born
programme.desc: Audrey finds herself under suspicion after a valuable piece of DeVere's antique china mysteriously disappears while she helps him catalogue his collection. Comedy, starring Penelope Keith and Peter Bowles

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard is dismayed when Marina unwittingly buys him a life-like gorilla which attracts the attention of the local police. Meanwhile, a newspaper article prompts Truly, Clegg and Billy to try to track down Cyril Cooper - a man renowned for his green fingers and womanising ways. Comedy, starring Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled, so the cleric gets his walking boots on to solve the crime. Murder mystery, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Sean becomes prime suspect when Leonie is raped, and the authorities believe he could be responsible for the string of murders Andy and the team have been investigating. Meanwhile, John has to think fast when he's asked why his number was on Vicky's phone, and a gift for Ryan on his tenth birthday reminds Catherine that danger may be closer than she thinks. Elsewhere, Daryl takes action when he is confronted by the three lads who have been bullying him. Crime drama, starring Sarah Lancashire and James Norton

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra is reunited with an old flame when DCI Larson of the Met's arts and antiques squad asks her to look into the murder of an antiques dealer who was not quite as legitimate as everyone thought. Brian is puzzled by Esther's odd behaviour and her new-found interest in the internet, leading him to think the unthinkable - she must be having an affair. Paul McGann and Jesse Birdsall guest star, with Amanda Redman and Alun Armstrong

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: When a troubled gambler is murdered at a greyhound track it seems that his enormous debts have cost him his life. The investigation leads Ross and the team from race-fixing to sex tapes, and in the midst of it all one of their suspects - who include the victim's ex-wife and a dog handler with dark secrets - turns up dead. Detective drama, starring John Michie, Blythe Duff and Alex Norton

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The team reopens a murder case Spencer worked on while he was a policeman at the Atomic Energy Commission, in which two anti-nuclear campaigners were killed. With definite DNA evidence at their disposal, Boyd and his staff are confident about making a conviction

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The pace of Christmas proves too much for Sharon as a few too many slices of chocolate cake sends her off into a dream world where she is the rich member of the family, happily married to rock star husband Chris, while sister Tracey is a downtrodden housewife in a run-down council flat and man-eating neighbour Dorien her dowdy cleaning lady. Festive edition of the comedy from 1994, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph, with a guest appearance by film-maker Michael Winner

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Madly in love with one of Lady Jane's old school friends, Lovejoy finds it hard to keep his mind on work and mistakes a set of fake watercolours for the real thing. While he's off trying to put matters right, Eric takes charge of furnishing Dalrymple's stately home - with disastrous results. Joanna Lumley guest stars

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Eric gets involved with an Irish rock band, while Lovejoy takes to the water with Lady Jane's friend Victoria Cavero and bravely pops the question - only to receive an unexpected response. Ian McShane, Dudley Sutton and Chris Jury star with guests Joanna Lumley and the members of Hothouse Flowers

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lady Jane persuades Lovejoy to act as driver for an old friend who has to attend her sea-faring brother's burial. The roguish antiques dealer is given the job of selling the late captain's Second World War medals, and there is a smart fashion photographer who wants them. However, some drunken sailors then come into the picture and Lovejoy finds himself dealing with the gun-toting Italian Angelo Pantaloni. Light-hearted drama, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A collector from Australia visits Britain to search for the one item he's coveted all his life - the legendary Benin Bronze. Unfortunately, the DTI won't allow an export licence, so he devises another way of getting hold of it. Drama, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Framed by long-time enemy Ducos for stealing Napoleon's treasures, Sharpe is abandoned by his wife Jane, and goes on the run from both the English and the French until he can prove his innocence. Period adventure, starring Sean Bean, Daragh O'Malley, Abigail Cruttenden and Cecile Paoli

programme.title: As Time Goes By
programme.desc: Judith's former boyfriend Alistair rocks the boat by asking Sandy for a date, and Jean is given cause to feel jealous of Lionel. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Geoffrey Palmer

programme.title: As Time Goes By
programme.desc: Lionel suffers embarrassment when he walks in on Sandy in the bath, and once the sniggers subside Jean decides to have a second bathroom installed and calls in the builders. As the tension increases, she realises a minor incident has been turned into a major issue that she can ill afford

programme.title: As Time Goes By
programme.desc: Jean falls out with Lionel, but the tense atmosphere between them does not prevent a visit from her sister-in-law Penny and husband Stephen. Bob Larbey's comedy about late-blossoming love, starring Judi Dench and Geoffrey Palmer

programme.title: As Time Goes By
programme.desc: Lionel is concerned that he has no pension plans, so the ever-resourceful Alistair comes up with an ingenious idea - to sell the country house. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Geoffrey Palmer

programme.title: Dial M for Middlesbrough
programme.desc: Johnny Vegas and Sian Gibson return as Terry and Gemma from Draper's Tours, this time finding themselves forced to take refuge at a sinister and dilapidated caravan park after their coach breaks down. During the unplanned stay, visitors and residents begin to be bumped off one by one under grizzly circumstances. Black comedy, co-starring Sally Lindsay, Phil Davis, Joanna Page, Jason Donovan and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: It is 1931 and socialite Iris Carr (Tuppence Middleton) is travelling back from a holiday in the Balkans, but faints on the platform of the railway station in the scorching heat. She is comforted by fellow passenger Miss Froy (Selina Cadell), but when Iris falls asleep she awakes to find the woman has disappeared and everyone else on board denies ever having seen her. With only handsome traveller Max Hare (Tom Hughes) for support, Iris maintains that Miss Froy has somehow been abducted - even though it increasingly appears to be a delusion on her part. Mystery, also starring Keeley Hawes, Gemma Jones, Stephanie Cole and Julian Rhind-Tutt. Adapted from Ethel Lina White's novel, The Wheel Spins

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty and amiable sidekick Geoffrey become embroiled in a convoluted case involving a deaf birdwatcher who goes missing at the same time as a woman's body is found at the bottom of a cliff he is known to frequent. Light-hearted drama, with Patricia Routledge and Dominic Monaghan, featuring a guest appearance by David Bower

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: In the tense build-up to a world trade summit in Edinburgh, Rebus looks forward to a well-earned day off - until Siobhan rings to say a body has been found in the grounds of the hotel hosting the conference. When a government minister is later killed in a fall from the castle ramparts, the abrasive copper comes up against Commander Steelforth of the SO12 unit providing security for the summit and, not for the first time, finds himself at odds with the Establishment. Julie Graham guest stars, with Ken Stott and Claire Price

programme.title: Wallander
programme.desc: Kenneth Branagh stars as the world-weary Swedish detective in a fourth and final series of adaptations of Henning Mankell's novels. Wallander travels to Cape Town to investigate the disappearance of a Swedish woman. He uncovers a complex conspiracy behind the mystery, and is also confronted with a nation that has reached a turning point in its history

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: A pub landlady is stabbed to death and has the tip of her little finger cut off, and while Leo and Jack collect mounting evidence that her husband was responsible, Nikki remains convinced of the man's innocence. When he is charged with the crime, she must convince her colleagues the woman was the latest victim of a psychopathic serial killer, resulting in a deadly game of cat and mouse as they seek out the culprit. Christine Bottomley, Penny Downie and Christopher Fulford guest star in a feature-length episode of the forensic drama
