programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa develops a crush on school bully Nelson, while Homer gets hold of an automatic dialling device used by telemarketing companies and uses it to bombard the people of Springfield with calls asking for money

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders' home is destroyed by a hurricane, so his well-meaning friends and neighbours rally round to attempt to rebuild it. Unfortunately, their shoddy workmanship causes him to give up on life and suffer a nervous breakdown

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An overdose of spicy Mexican food at the local chilli festival causes Homer to experience a series of hallucinations that inspire him to set out in search of his true soulmate. Featuring the guest voice of Johnny Cash as a talking coyote

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer claims he encountered an extraterrestrial on a drunken walk home, prompting X-Files agents Mulder and Scully to investigate both him and the sighting. Featuring the guest voices of David Duchovny, Gillian Anderson and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is kicked out of her ladies' investment club and responds by starting her own business selling hot pretzels - with a little help from Homer and local mob boss Fat Tony. Featuring the guest voices of Jack Lemmon and Joe Mantegna

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Wealthy university student Fatima learns how to budget when she moves in with Nicky, a single mum and youth worker who is struggling to make ends meet

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Another glimpse into the lives of expats who have left the UK for a new life in the Spanish sun. Cabaret star Mark - who appears on stage as Ruby Rox - films a video to play as part of his show, and sisters Vina and Nilam launch a business selling spice kits so expats can make their own curries. Tattoo artists Blane and Mark are in need of more customers, while retiree and metal detector enthusiast Stan spends his evenings searching the beaches for small change

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Series in which two families exchange holidays to see if money can buy happiness. A family from Bristol, who earn enough to be categorised in the wealthiest one per cent in Britain, trade their safari trip in Zambia for a stay in a B&B on a windswept Isle of Wight, with a family of six from Scunthorpe whose weekly income is roughly £130

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey and Sister Benita Wainwright treat Phil, who has the rare condition aortic dissection, while Dr Humphrey also tries to put a man's dislocated shoulder into place. Consultant Dr Bharath Reddy and junior Dr George Kay are on standby to treat 14-month-old Heaven, who is rushed in with breathing problems, while volunteer Jane keeps the team and patients fed and watered

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: After receiving reports that a lorry driver has almost struck a road worker on the M1, officers race to intercept a seven-and-a-half-ton truck, with Sgt Scott Riley deploying a stinger to bring the vehicle to a standstill. PC Chris Ryan receives a police camera alert that the driver in the car in front of him may under the influence of drugs, while Sgt Steve Hughes and his team investigate a crash in which a car hit a wall

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshire's finest face a series of issues with motorcyclists - with one evading them for over an hour in a high-speed chase

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Kev Salter and Ian Squire hunt for a man roaming the late-night streets with a machete, while the driver of a Ford Fiesta takes a pursuit off-road. Elsewhere, an uninsured boy racer takes his mum's car out for a spin with his mates, but leaves a trail of destruction in his wake, and a call comes in about a sharpshooter who is drunk and looking for a fight

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Damien Stevens draws his stun gun on an aggressive driver, while the hunt for a suspected armed robber turns up a nasty surprise for dog handler Jimmy Grieves. Paul Jackson grapples with a man armed with a machete, and officers get kitted up to raid the home of a suspected cannabis grower

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The series exploring the work of the North-East's high-speed police interception unit continues as Damo Stevens hunts down a heroin dealer, and Jacko rushes to a critical car crash. The interceptors are also called to investigate some potentially hazardous goods, and Kev makes an intriguing discovery in an airing cupboard. Plus, a young driver makes a mistake she may come to regret

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall's casebook starts with a broken bond between two best friends. Cairn terrier Ted has turned on his owner Mike after having a stroke and now Mike can't even cross his front room without Ted attacking him. Can Graeme help them pave the way back to friendship? There's a little girl's best friend, who is perfect at home, but a nightmare in the neighbourhood, leaving mum Jess so stressed out with his bad behaviour that if things don't change, she wants to rehome him

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Leo invites Chloe to visit the vineyard he is buying. Pierce and Hendrix bond as Mr Greyson prepares to leave for Sydney

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin returns home after his overdose episode, but his attitude is still terrible. Mac gets a reality check after a video of her is posted online, and John secretly contacts Susie

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: New Saydo Park arrivals Carole and Phyllis already love life in Spain but they want to experience more of the community spirit, so they sign up for fellow resident Margaret's mystery tour. Where will it take them? Tree surgeon Rocky faces danger on a daily basis as he tends to the high branches of the Costa del Sol, while young magician Dean faces the first night of a residency at the Chamber of Secrets theatre

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Doctors treat Craig, a window-fitter who has fallen from a ladder and has been knocked unconscious. He has a huge gash to the back on his head, but the medical staff are concerned he may have also seriously injured his neck and spine. Meanwhile, Advanced Nurse Practitioner Dave Sagol meets 61-year-old June, who has been rushed into the hospital with swollen legs and having difficulty breathing

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Dr Adil gets a surprise while operating on a lipoma, and a patient develops large lumps called keloids on both her ears as a result of getting her ears pierced

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Helen has an aneurysm in her brain that could burst at any time and lead to her death within minutes. For doctor Sanjeev Nayak there are no second chances as he embarks on an extraordinary operation to save his patient. Michael's life is also on a knife edge. After collapsing with a cardiac arrest, he was saved by a neighbour giving him CPR. But now the trauma doctors face a double battle - they must quickly assess his head injury and also remove a clot in his artery that is destroying his heart

programme.title: Shopping for a New Penis
programme.desc: Documentary following the story of theatre performer Richard from London, whose entire penis was surgically removed due to an aggressive form of penile cancer. Richard is still coming to terms with the physical and emotional impact of this ordeal on his everyday life and relationships, but with a candid sense of humour, he is confronting his situation head-on - sharing his story as a warning to others about a disease on the increase

programme.title: Eating Ourselves to Death
programme.desc: Documentary following three morbidly obese British people as they discuss the problems they face. For Darren - a 40-stone man who consumes more than 11,000 calories per day - his weight is now a matter of life or death, leading to serious heart complications. Mother-of-two Alice has struggled with her weight for years and tips the scales at 35 stone, while Alex's life has been destroyed by his food addiction

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: Real life cases of people murdered by their own partners, beginning with a controlling taxi driver who reacted violently at the prospect of his relationship ending

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Another glimpse into the lives of expats who have left the UK for a new life in the Spanish sun. Former Glaswegian taxi drivers Pete and Kath came to Benidorm to retire, only to end up taking over a bar, while fitness instructor and entrepreneur Anthony has organised a campsite coach trip to the Algar waterfalls. Female impersonator James and his partner David have rented a working farm, and it proves a steep learning curve for the pair who have sunk every penny into the project

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Wealthy Cheshire entrepreneur Jude Cisse takes her family to experience a caravan break in Devon, and has trouble adjusting to the lack of privacy their crammed campsite provides. The hard-up McQueens from Peckham, who survive on dad Jay's £450 a week bus-driver wage, last went on holiday two years ago in a caravan on the South Coast. They take a trip to Jude's private, staffed villa in Morocco and are initially awe-struck at the luxury they experience

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A 74-year-old with breathing difficulties is rushed into Barnsley Hospital, and registrar Dr Nick Mani considers placing the patient in a medically-induced coma to stabilise him. Junior doctor Ashleigh Trimble assesses 70-year-old Dave, whose daughter Sarah fears her dad's confusion and loss of appetite are masking a more serious condition

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A fire extinguisher is launched from a fleeing getaway car. An insight into the working life of officers patrolling Britain's roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team are outnumbered and outmuscled when they stop a coach-load of cage fighters following an anonymous tip off that there may be drugs on board. A suspected wheel thief kicks off on the carriageway. When Interceptors Kev and Andy pull over a Peugeot, the occupants are in no mood to hang around. Finally, a drunk dices with death as he walks the wrong way up the middle of the busy A19

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Kev and Steve go on the hunt for suspected heroin dealers, while dog handler Liam attends the scene of a suspected arson attack. Damo deals with a drunk driver, and another man is so inebriated behind the steering wheel that he blows three-and-a-half times over the limit

Oscar-winning historical epic, directed by and starring Mel Gibson. With Patrick McGoohan, Sophie Marceau and Catherine McCormack

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the work of Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. The team is called to a building site to treat a roofer who has picked up a nasty leg fracture in a fall. programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: In Tyne and Wear, the Sunderland Neighbourhood Team is called to an act of racist graffiti outside a mosque. When more graffiti appears on the house of a resident close by, the team members notice similarities between the two acts of vandalism and attempt to hunt down those responsible. In Washington, PC Glen is stopped by a woman who has been harassed by youths on mopeds in the local park

programme.title: Motorbike Cops

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Frontline Police
programme.desc: Rav Wilding joins Essex officers investigating reports of a woman exposing herself in public, but matters get heated when her partner reacts aggressively to their questions. Another unit chases a motorist speeding at 130mph along the A12, a convoy of travellers is stopped at a police roadblock on Canvey Island, and an uninsured driver tries a peculiar tactic to avoid being arrested. Elsewhere, Special Operations turn a drug farm into compost

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the motives of killer Roderick Newall, who inherited millions of pounds when his parents were legally declared dead three years after he reported them missing in October 1987. Roderick came under suspicion of murder when traces of blood were later discovered in the family home, and was jailed for life in 1994 after he was tricked into a confession by his uncle. His younger brother Mark was also charged with conspiring to cover up the crime

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: Exploring the story of Armin Meiwes, who in Germany in 2002 filmed himself killing and eating a victim he had contacted via the internet

programme.title: The Mark of a Killer
programme.desc: The actions of a killer who openly hunted his victims in piano bars, hiding in plain sight by working as a nurse

programme.title: Stone Age
programme.desc: Meet a group of typical suburban nine-year-old kids with friends, foes and families kicking it really old school, in prehistoric times

programme.title: Stone Age
programme.desc: Meet a group of typical suburban nine-year-old kids with friends, foes and families kicking it really old school, in prehistoric times

programme.title: Legend of the Dragon
programme.desc: The guardian of the temple has passed on and a new Golden Dragon must be Chosen from a brother and sister - Twins born in the Year of the Dragon. Only one will be chosen. Their sibling bond tested

programme.title: Roswell Conspiracies
programme.desc: Part one. Logan becomes persistent in asking aliens questions about his father

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Kong, Jason, jungle girl Lua, fun-loving Tann and wise Dr. Jenkins take on power-hungry scientists, ferocious prehistoric creatures and incredible magical beings to protect their unique island home

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Most Dangerous Ways to School
programme.desc: Children who take treacherous journeys to school, climbing up mountainous paths, swimming across rivers or fighting their way through icy wastelands

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Vicar Ann Chapman, who runs four rural churches in the Dales, talks about her job, while Adrian Edmondson tries his hand at sheepdog training with 16-year-old shepherd Phillip Mellin and his mother Carol. Plus, fashion designer Izzy Lane and farmer Ernest Ayre try to track down a ram on the loose in their sheep sanctuary

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old shepherd Phillip Mellin goes to Skipton Auction Mart hoping to buy a dog he can train, while his mother Carol tries to sell her four-legged friend Jess. Tom Orde-Powlett sets up a boar park at Bolton Castle in Wensleydale, and Adrian Edmondson meets the Leyburn Band during preparations for the Hardraw Scar Brass Band Contest

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright finds out about the precautions taken when food is imported into Britain, seeing how health inspectors check consignments at the Port of Felixstowe - including testing products from Japan for radiation - and how sniffer dogs help ensure no illegal foodstuffs are brought into the country at Gatwick Airport. Chris Hollins meets an Exeter woman who ended up in intensive care suffering from E-coli after eating a bought sandwich and Ben Milligan travels to a family home in Holmfirth near Huddersfield that appears clean and tidy - but his bacteria tests still spring a few surprises

programme.title: Death at Broadcasting House (1934)
programme.desc: When an actor is murdered, Detective Inspector Gregory quickly discovers that the victim had many enemies. Drama, starring Jack Hawkins, Donald Wolfit and Ian Hunter

programme.title: Man Friday (1975)
programme.desc: Shipwrecked mariner Robinson Crusoe is overjoyed to discover he has a fellow castaway, a black islander whom he names Friday, and insists in treating as a servant and trying to convert to Western culture. Friday quickly grasps that Crusoe will never see him as an equal, and uses his cunning to turns the tables on the Englishman. Comedy, starring Peter O'Toole and Richard Roundtree

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Lee, Bermondsey and Stratford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary's two-timing antics leave him strapped for cash, so he sets out to find a new career in 1941 and hatches a scheme to clean up in the 1990s antiques trade. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: London Districts

programme.title: A Year at Kew

programme.desc: Identical twin gynaecologists Elliot and Beverly share everything in their life. Elliot, self-assured and experienced, passes his unwitting sexual conquests to shy and sensitive Beverly when he tires of them. However, when Beverly falls in love for the first time with a patient, the affair drives the brothers apart - and both men begin to lose their grip on their sanity. David Cronenberg's psychological thriller, with Jeremy Irons in a dual role alongside Genevieve Bujold

programme.title: Pointless

programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Manchester United v Tottenham Hotspur. Action from the showpiece encounter at Wembley Stadium, where the first major trophy of the season was contested. Spurs were the holders, having defeated Chelsea 2-1 after extra time in last year's final, while the Red Devils had last lifted the cup in 2006 following a comfortable 4-0 win against Wigan Athletic

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, where the winner of the first major trophy of the 2011/12 season was decided. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset

programme.title: The Open Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the second day of the Open Championship, taking place at Royal St. George's Golf Club in Sandwich, Kent. JB Holmes and eventual champion Shane Lowry shared the lead on eight-under at this stage in Portrush when the tournament was last held two years ago. At the other end of the leaderboard, both Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson missed the cut, the first time both of them had done so in 83 Majors, while other notable casualties included home player Graeme McDowell and defending champion Francesco Molinari

programme.title: Live International T20 Cricket
programme.desc: England v Pakistan. Coverage of the first T20 in the three-match series, taking place at Trent Bridge, Nottingham. Eoin Morgan's side will be looking to build on their T20 series win against Sri Lanka last month, having comprehensively beaten their opponents 3-0 in a three-match series. Pakistan have visited England twice in the last two years, drawing one series last year 1-1 and losing 1-0 in 2019.
